name: Syllabus AI-Policy Reviewer
description: Reviews AI-policy language for clarity, alignment, and student usability.
prompts: Review this policy as a tired student. What is unclear?
Check whether this policy explains why each boundary exists.
expectation: Plan for about 10 minutes; you make the final call.

name: Assignment Redesign Coach
description: Helps stress-test and redesign an assignment around its essential learning.
prompts: Stress-test this assignment against its learning outcome.
Suggest one redesign that preserves the core thinking.
expectation: Best used with one assignment and one learning outcome.

name: Equity and Ethics Audit Guide
description: Walks through access, privacy, truth, copyright, labor, and power questions.
prompts: Audit this AI activity for access and privacy concerns.
Which students are presumed by this design?
expectation: Use the output as a question list, not a compliance determination.

name: AIAS Decision Partner
description: Supports a documented choice about the role of AI in an assessment.
prompts: Which AIAS level fits this assessment and why?
What evidence should remain visible at this level?
expectation: A starting point for faculty judgment, not an automatic classification.

name: AI Role-Play Chatbot Builder
description: Helps faculty design a realistic student-facing stakeholder chatbot that challenges reasoning and supports reflection.
capabilities: Define the learning objective, student role, and stakeholder role
Build realistic context, constraints, tradeoffs, and information to withhold
Produce ready-to-paste chatbot instructions and a testing checklist
prompts: Help me turn an existing case study into an AI role-play.
I want students to practice a difficult professional conversation.
Review and improve my role-play chatbot idea.
expectation: Bring one scenario or professional interaction; you provide the disciplinary expertise and make the final design decisions.
